title: Fresh Look: New Dyes

![FL ND Modrinth Page 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdb4f7ec4521ca1eea4dd9222400943322852ecf_0.webp)

# Fresh Look: New Dyes
Fresh Look: Old Dyes updates the dye textures (using the post-1.21.9 style). The textures are based on [the previous version of the resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/freshlook-old-dyes), which used dyes without the “bowl”. In this version, the dyes include a small bowl, matching the vanilla style introduced in 1.21.9.

![FL ND Modrinth Page 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e844ecaea65cef06b05111f3f2ae1b136ffa85f1_0.webp)
